title: The Greatest Salesman in the World
author: Og Mandino
subline: 10 scrolls to becoming the person you were meant to be.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- 10 vertical scroll lines (parallel hairlines) below the title. The 7th scroll is RED — the one the book is most known for ('I will persist until I succeed'). -->
  <g transform="translate(0 1100)">
    <line x1="80" y1="0" x2="80" y2="800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="232" y1="0" x2="232" y2="800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="384" y1="0" x2="384" y2="800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="536" y1="0" x2="536" y2="800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="688" y1="0" x2="688" y2="800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="840" y1="0" x2="840" y2="800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="992" y1="0" x2="992" y2="800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="1144" y1="0" x2="1144" y2="800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="1296" y1="0" x2="1296" y2="800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="1448" y1="0" x2="1448" y2="800" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- The 7th scroll is RED -->
    <rect x="970" y="0" width="44" height="800" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="992" y="-30" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">VII</text>
    <!-- The 7 scroll labels (Roman numerals) at top of each line -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="0.18em">
      <text x="80" y="-30">I</text>
      <text x="232" y="-30">II</text>
      <text x="384" y="-30">III</text>
      <text x="536" y="-30">IV</text>
      <text x="688" y="-30">V</text>
      <text x="840" y="-30">VI</text>
      <text x="1296" y="-30">VIII</text>
      <text x="1448" y="-30">IX</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Bottom rule -->
    <line x1="80" y1="830" x2="1448" y2="830" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="800" y="900" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">I WILL PERSIST UNTIL I SUCCEED</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Ten vertical hairline 'scrolls' (parallel lines) running the lower 2/3 of the cover, each labeled I–X with Roman numerals. Scroll VII is rendered as a red 3px outlined box with a red 'VII' — the book's most famous scroll ('I will persist until I succeed'). Title 280px uppercase, three lines, weight 500. The composition is a column of wisdom, one scroll alight.
